title: MikroTik C53UiG+5HPaxD2HPaxD, hAP ax3
description: The router for households or small companies with the designation hAP ax3 or C53UiG+5HPaxD2HPaxD has an L6 license, desktop design and includes 5 Gigabit ports of which the 1st port supports both PoE in and PoE out and even 2.5 Gigabit ethernet. In addition, the router has two radio parts supporting 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax standards allowing simultaneous operation in both bands and two removable omnidirectional antennas.
